title: Story Mode Mob Battle Music + CWSM compatibility
description: Changes mob battle music into music from mcsm and is compatible with crackers wither storm mod!
body:
![title card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3c3c090b3fdfdcc9601482c652186899828a67b.png)

adds mcsm battle music to your game and adds music for the command block in crackers wither storm mod
i didn't make the music, antimo & welles did. Please don't slime me for using the music😥
if you want to see the mod in action in beautiful 240p:
[A google drive to dev log videos](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1wFpweEqTUZQN1RkrXDKPFBbVLdX6iTKv?usp=sharing)
